view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for Zoom, Google Meet, and Teams integration is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for Zoom, Google Meet, and Teams integration is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement by confirming that the system integrates with Zoom for telehealth sessions, as evidenced by the creation of a unique Zoom meeting link for a scheduled session. The linked use case explicitly states the need for Zoom integration, and the scenario provided demonstrates that this integration is functioning as intended. Additionally, the prior step evidence shows that external integrations have been configured, supporting the requirement's coverage.
